sections.paragraph:
Piel, to root out, eradicate, extirpate, Psa 52:7 Job 31:12.

Pual שֹׁרַשׁ pass. Job 31:8.

Poel שֹׁרֵשׁ to take root (pr. to make, to produce root), Isa 40:24.

Poal, id. Jer 12:2.

Hiphil, i.q. Poel, Job 5:3 Isa 27:6 (and there metaph. of a man flourishing in prosperity), with the addition of שָֽׁרָשִׁים Psa 80:10.
